scope: MiroFish v4 engine calibration and report observability

problem.summary: The latest committed MiroFish v4 run collapsed to near-zero final adoption across 515 domains, making agent-choice output look empty.
root_cause: trial-stage learning inflated persona adoption thresholds too aggressively
trial counted as full adoption inside the fatigue penalty
retention gates were too harsh for a 20-round simulation window
report ranking emphasized final retained adoption and hid stronger mid-run choice signal

actions: exclude trial from fatigue adoption count
limit threshold learning to retained stages
sort report by agent_choice_signal before final adoption
add driver/risk language for high-interest but low-retention trajectories
record root cause, before/after metrics, and verification notes

known_preexisting_failures: tests/test_simulation.py expects 6 adoption stages; v4 now has 9
tests/test_simulation.py expects run_ensemble(n_runs=3) to return exactly 3; v4 enforces a 15-run minimum
